person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com 
Gerhard von Wassenberg, graaf van Gelre 
Also Known As: "Gerard 'de Lange' van Wassenberg Gelre II", "Gerard II 'de Lange' van Gelre" Birthdate: circa 1086 Birthplace: Wassenberg, Koeln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany Death: October 24, 1131 (40-49) Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands Place of Burial: Wassenberg Wald Friedhof, Waldfeucht, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germany Immediate 
Family: 

Son of Count Gerard van Wassenberg, IV and Clémence d'Aquitaine, De Limbourg Arlon 

Husband of Ermengarde of Zutphen 

Father of 
Hendrik I, count of Guelders; 
Salome van Gelre-Zutphen; 
Gerhard van Gelre Wassenberg, III and
 Adelheid van Gelre 

Brother of Judith van Gelder Wassenberg; Adelheid von Wassenberg, Grafin von van Tecklenburg; Yolande van Gelre, Vrouwe van Dodewaard en Dalen, von Wassenberg, Grafin von Gelre von Wassenberg, Countess of Hennegau and N.N. Gerhardsdotter van Heinsberg Half brother of Ermesinde II, Comtesse de Luxembourg Occupation: Count, Graaf van Gelre van 1129 tot 1131 (ook Gerard IV van Wassenberg)
LESS

Gerard II van Gelre (circa 1090 -16 oktober 1133). Hij was de zoon van Gerard I van Gelre en Clementia van Aquitanië. Gerard was als Gerard  V heer van Wassenberg en als Gerard II graaf van Gelre 1129 tot zijn dood. Gerard ligt begraven in de kerk van Wassenberg. 

Hij trouwde in 1116 met Ermgard van Zutphen, de erfdochter van het graafschap Zutphen (gebied ten oosten van de IJssel en talrijke buitenposten in Friesland, Westfalen en het Rijnland). 

Ermgard van Zutphen († 1138) Ermgard was de dochter van graaf Otto II van Zutphen uit zijn tweede huwelijk met Judith van Arnstein. Na het kinderloze overlijden van haar broer Hendrik I werd Ermgard in 1118 gravin van Zutphen haar dood in 1138. Gerard en Ermgard kregen drie kinderen:
1 Adelheid, trouwde met graaf Ekbert van Tecklenburg.
2 Hendrik I (-1182), graaf van Gelre en Zutphen.
3 Salomea (-1167), trouwde met graaf Hendrik I van Wildeshausen 

Ermgard hertrouwde na de dood van Gerard II in 1134 met graaf Koenraad II van Luxemburg (-1136). Dit huwelijk bleef kinderloos.

sourceList.title: Gerhard II von Geldern, „Find A Grave Index“

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg於1086年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格瓦瑟格時，他的父親Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg26歲，母親Clémence d'Aquitaine26歲。他於大約1116年與Ermgard van Zutphen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1131年10月24日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德享年45歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格瓦瑟格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg于1086年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格瓦瑟格时，他的父亲Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg26岁，母亲Clémence d'Aquitaine26岁。他于大约1116年与Ermgard van Zutphen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1131年10月24日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德享年45岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格瓦瑟格。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Geldern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): in northern England usually a variant of Geldard, an occupational name from Middle English gelde ‘sterile, barren’, used as a noun to denote ‘gelded cattle’, + Old English hierde, hence ‘herdman who tends the gelded cattle’.
English: alternatively, perhaps an occupational name from Middle English gelder(e) ‘gelder, castrator (of livestock)’.

variants.name: Gilder
meanings: English (Essex and Middlesex): occupational name for a goldsmith or gilder, from Middle English gilder, gelder, guldar, a derivative of Old English gyldan ‘to gild’.

nameMeanings.name: Gerhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg was born in 1086, in Wassenberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, was 26 and his mother, Clémence d'Aquitaine, was 26. He married Ermgard van Zutphen about 1116. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 24 October 1131, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 45, and was buried in Wassenberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg est né en 1086, à Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Clémence d'Aquitaine, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Ermgard van Zutphen environ 1116. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 24 octobre 1131, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg 1086 in Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg 26 und seine Mutter Clémence d'Aquitaine 26. Er hat um 1116 Ermgard van Zutphen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Oktober 1131 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg è nato il nel 1086 nel Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Clémence d'Aquitaine, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Ermgard van Zutphen circa 1116. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1131, nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenbergが1086年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグワセンバーグで生まれた時，父Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenbergは26歳，母Clémence d'Aquitaineは26歳であった。約1116年にErmgard van Zutphenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1131年10月24日にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで45歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグワセンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg(이)가 1086년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 하인스버그 와센버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Clémence d'Aquitaine(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1116년 Ermgard van Zutphen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 10월 24일 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 하인스버그 와센버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg nasceu em 1086, em Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Clémence d'Aquitaine, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermgard van Zutphen aproximadamente 1116. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1131, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg родился в 1086 г. в местности вассенбирг, хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence d'Aquitaine, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermgard van Zutphen около 1116 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 24 октября 1131 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности вассенбирг, хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

sm.1129-1133: mai le 1129 e o'o I le 1133

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerhard II. von Geldern Wassenberg nació en 1086, en Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard I. von Geldern-Wassenberg, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Clémence d'Aquitaine, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Ermgard van Zutphen aproximadamente 1116. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1131, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Wassenberg, Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
